title: String Functions
description: Fungsi-fungsi untuk manipulasi string di MySQL.

commands.name: CONCAT
commands.title: CONCAT / CONCAT_WS

commands.name: SUBSTRING
commands.title: SUBSTRING / LEFT / RIGHT
commands.syntax: SUBSTRING(str, pos, len) / LEFT(str, len) / RIGHT(str, len)

commands.name: LENGTH
commands.title: LENGTH / CHAR_LENGTH
commands.examples:
SELECT CHAR_LENGTH(username) AS name_length FROM users;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(password_hash) < 60;
commands.notes: LENGTH() menghitung bytes, CHAR_LENGTH() menghitung karakter (penting untuk UTF-8).

commands.name: REPLACE
commands.title: REPLACE

commands.name: TRIM
commands.title: TRIM / LTRIM / RTRIM
commands.description: Menghapus spasi atau karakter dari awal/akhir string.

commands.name: UPPER-LOWER
commands.title: UPPER / LOWER

commands.name: REGEXP
commands.title: REGEXP / REGEXP_REPLACE
commands.description: Pattern matching dan replace dengan regular expression.
commands.syntax: str REGEXP pattern / REGEXP_REPLACE(str, pattern, replacement)

commands.name: FORMAT-LPAD
commands.title: FORMAT / LPAD / RPAD
commands.syntax: FORMAT(number, decimals) / LPAD(str, len, pad) / RPAD(str, len, pad)
